content.text: Intake 구조, manager script, skill consistency 검토에서 확인된 개선 사항을 수정한다.
Intake가 package boundary와 lifecycle readiness를 보존하고 capability output과 profile validation이 일치한다.

criteria: journal recovery cannot write outside the package through symlinks
ready content mutation invalidates Intake readiness
closed and superseded packages reject mutation
capability evidence kinds satisfy readiness without duplicate summaries
anchored item ids are unambiguous within a section
specification resolution and interview decision kinds have explicit contracts
focused and complete regression tests pass
